## End-of-day practice

Complete the following tasks / activities before heading home for the day!

- [{{< fa pencil title="A pencil" >}} **Day 4 Practice:** Matrices and matrix algebra, exploring and summarizing data](eod-practice/eod-day4.qmd)

## Additional Resources

- **[Intro to matrix multiplication](https://www.khanacademy.org/math/precalculus/x9e81a4f98389efdf:matrices/x9e81a4f98389efdf:multiplying-matrices-by-matrices/v/matrix-multiplication-intro), by Khan Academy** -- a video on what it means to multiply two matrices, and an example
- **[Leslie Matrix Models](https://web.math.utk.edu/~heather/lecture17.pdf)** -- more examples; in particular, check out the American Bison Model section
